emails.subject: US Bandwidth STM-1
emails.body: I take it you signed off on this new product. It is pretty common that we just copy the profile for a similar product for the existing 1500-2000 counterparties. Let me know if you think this is a problem. Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 11/07/2000 03:10 PM Lisa Lees 11/07/2000 03:08 PM

emails.body: Re: US Bandwidth STM-1 Tana, There is a problem. We do not have the correct Qos for the STM- 1 for a UK deal. Marie will call you. Robbi Rossi Sr. Counsel Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 345-7268 Fax: (713) 646-8537
